Boston Dynamics
Waltham, MA

The Head of Strategic Programs & Business Operations PMO owns and evolves enterprise execution.

Responsibilities

  • Lead cross-functional prioritization across GTM, finance, product, and IT.
  • Establish governance cadence and executive reporting.
  • Build and coach a program management team.

Qualifications

  • 8+ years program management experience.
  • Strong executive communication and influence skills.
